name: goliath/wg-compatible-systems
title: Why Goliath – Compatible Systems
description: White section with heading, two paragraphs, and a two-column bullet grid of compatible racking system types.

heading.default: Compatible with All Major Racking Systems

p1.default: Warehouses are built differently, and so are racking systems.

p2.default: Goliath™ retrofits to all major pallet racking systems used in the UK, making it a flexible solution for different industries and layouts. This allows you to upgrade your existing racks without having to replace the entire structure.
